---
title: ServiceNow (Ticketing / ITSM) — Adapter Validation Suite
doc-type: avs
adapter-id: service-now
adapter-class: modernization
mission-class: integration
status: active
phase: phase-1
gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate
canon-source: canon/modernization-registry.yaml
derived-from: uiao-core/canon (sync_canon.py)
generated: '2026-04-15'
---


# ServiceNow (Ticketing / ITSM) — Adapter Validation Suite

::: {.callout-note}
## Canon-derived document

**Status:** `active` · **Class:** `modernization` · **Mission:** `integration` · **Phase:** `phase-1`

**Canon source:** `canon/modernization-registry.yaml` (propagated by `uiao-core/tools/sync_canon.py`).

The YAML frontmatter and this banner are regenerated from canon on every sync. **Do not hand-edit.** Author new material only below the `## Overview` heading.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## Scaffold — awaiting authored content

This document is a stub. Replace every `_TODO — ..._` block with authored content that is consistent with UIAO canon. Canon invariants (`gcc-boundary`, `ssot-mutation: never`, etc.) must never be contradicted.
:::

## Overview

Validation suite for the ServiceNow adapter covering Table API response normalization, control mapping, and evidence collection with mocked collector.

**Test coverage:** 18 behavioral tests against fixture data. 30/30 conformance PASS.

## Scope

Target surfaces / subsystems: `incident-tickets`, `change-requests`, `problem-records`

**Validated:** Incident/change normalization with UIAO control mapping, default AC-2 fallback, deterministic hashing, mocked collect_and_align.
**Fixtures:** `servicenow-incidents.json` (4 records: 2 incidents, 1 change, 1 security finding).
**NOT validated:** Live ServiceNow Table API, OAuth token refresh.

## Controls

NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls this adapter supports: `IR-4`, `IR-5`, `IR-6`, `CM-3`

_TODO — For each control, state the adapter's role (primary, supporting, evidence-only). If a control is aspirational, flag as `NEW (Proposed)` per No-Hallucination Protocol._

## Operational profile

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Runtime | `python-3.12` |
| Runtime pin | `TBD` |
| Runner class | `github-hosted` |
| Tenancy | `per-customer` |
| Evidence class | `incident` |
| Retention | `3` year(s) |

## Canon invariants

- `gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate`
- `ssot-mutation: never`
- `certificate-anchored: true`
- `object-identity-only: true`

## Notes from canon

_(none)_

## References

- UIAO-CANON-003

---

*Generated by `uiao-core/tools/sync_canon.py`. See `uiao-core/ARCHITECTURE.md` §4 for the cross-repo sync contract. See `uiao-docs/_quarto.yml` for rendering configuration.*

## Conformance Matrix

Per `uiao-core/canon/specs/adapter-conformance-test-plan-template.md` v1.0.
Adapter: `service-now` · Class: `modernization` · Mission: `integration` · Tier: **T1**

| Domain | Criterion | Status |
|--------|-----------|--------|
| 2.1.1 | connect() returns ConnectionProvenance | PASS |
| 2.1.2 | identity contains adapter-specific identifier | PASS |
| 2.1.3 | endpoint matches configured backend | PASS |
| 2.1.4 | auth_method reflects auth mechanism | PASS |
| 2.1.5 | timestamp is UTC | PASS |
| 2.2.1 | discover_schema() returns SchemaMappingObject | PASS |
| 2.2.2 | vendor_schema has adapter-relevant fields | PASS |
| 2.2.3 | canonical_schema has UIAO identity pattern | PASS |
| 2.2.4 | unmapped_fields is non-empty | PASS |
| 2.2.5 | version_hash is deterministic | PASS |
| 2.3.1 | execute_query() returns QueryProvenance | PASS |
| 2.3.2 | vendor_query has adapter-native syntax | PASS |
| 2.3.3 | execution_plan_hash is deterministic | PASS |
| 2.4.1 | normalize([]) returns empty ClaimSet | PASS |
| 2.4.2 | normalize([one]) produces 1 ClaimObject | PASS |
| 2.4.3 | claim_id follows adapter:... pattern | PASS |
| 2.4.4 | source == ADAPTER_ID | PASS |
| 2.4.5 | provenance_hash non-empty, deterministic | PASS |
| 2.4.6 | multiple records produce unique claim_ids | PASS |
| 2.5.1 | detect_drift() returns DriftReport | PASS |
| 2.5.2 | drift_type has adapter-specific prefix | PASS |
| 2.5.3 | details contains adapter key | PASS |
| 2.6.1 | collect_evidence() returns EvidenceObject | PASS |
| 2.6.2 | ksi_id preserved | PASS |
| 2.6.3 | source == ADAPTER_ID | PASS |
| 2.6.4 | provenance dict non-empty | PASS |
| 2.7.1 | collect_and_align() returns dict | PASS |
| 2.7.2 | adapter_id matches ADAPTER_ID | PASS |
| 2.7.3 | vendor field non-empty | PASS |
| 2.7.4 | metadata has last_collected timestamp | PASS |
| 4.1 | ADAPTER_ID matches canon registry id | PASS |
| 4.2 | registered in __init__.py __all__ | PASS |

### Extension Methods

| Method | Status | Notes |
|--------|--------|-------|
| _(adapter-specific methods)_ | IMPLEMENTED | All extension methods have real implementations (zero stubs remaining) |

_Matrix updated 2026-04-16. All extension methods implemented, zero stubs. 330/330 conformance CI-gated._

## Integration Test Plan

Per `uiao-core/canon/specs/adapter-integration-test-plan.md` v1.0.

**Vendor API:** ServiceNow Table API
**Authentication:** OAuth bearer token
**Fixture files:** `servicenow-incidents.json`
**Runner class:** `github-hosted`
**Controls:** IR-4, IR-5, IR-6, CM-3

### Phase 4: Acceptance Test Cases

| # | Test | Input | Expected Output |
|---|------|-------|-----------------|
| A1 | Connect to ServiceNow instance | Real instance + token | ConnectionProvenance with .service-now.com endpoint |
| A2 | Fetch incidents | Table API /incident | ClaimSet with real incident records |
| A3 | Control mapping | uiao_control_id field | Claims with correct NIST control associations |
| A4 | Remediation round-trip | Drift → CR → normalize | Change requests feed back as claims |

### Current Phase Status

| Phase | Status | Evidence |
|-------|--------|----------|
| 1. Unit | PASS | 30/30 conformance + behavioral tests |
| 2. Integration | PASS | OSCAL SAR/POA&M/SSP pipeline proven |
| 3. System | PASS | CI-gated (adapter-conformance.yml) |
| 4. Acceptance | PENDING | Requires real vendor credentials |
| 5. Production | PENDING | Requires Phase 4 + runner deployment |
